title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people at a funfair. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A mother and two children are at a funfair in the evening. The children are holding balloons and looking at a colourful ride. There are lights, stalls and other visitors around them.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people walking in the rain. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: Two students are walking along a city street in the rain. They are sharing a large umbrella and carrying school bags. The pavement is wet and there are shops and buses in the background.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
